title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The video argues this represents Microsoft's attempt to build a full-stack AI offering and position itself both as OpenAI's partner and as a competitive threat in the AI space.
